name: projects/12107255462624662036/screens/536b12fab59a46229d37725f0e20fa59
title: A professional and playful app icon for a financial app named 'HomeRatio'. The design features a modern, minimalist house silhouette that seamlessly integrates a percentage (%) or ratio symbol within its structure. A subtle upward-trending chart line is woven into the house's roofline, symbolizing growth. The color palette is deep emerald green, slate grey, and clean white. High-quality 3D render style with soft, ambient occlusion shadows and a touch of depth. Professional, secure, and modern.
